summary: Comprehensive testing of PSP (Payment Service Provider) feature completed successfully. All 14 backend tests passed. UI testing confirmed PSP management page, transaction creation with PSP destination, commission preview, settlement workflow, and navigation. Settlement API verified to correctly update treasury balance.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed but not blocking

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login (admin@fxbroker.com / admin123)
Backend: Accountant login (accountant@fxbroker.com / accountant123)
Backend: GET /api/psp - List all PSPs returns seeded PSPs (Stripe, PayPal, Skrill)
Backend: GET /api/psp-summary - Returns PSPs with pending_transactions_count, pending_amount, overdue_count
Backend: POST /api/psp - Create PSP with commission rate and settlement days
Backend: PUT /api/psp/{psp_id} - Update PSP commission rate and description
Backend: GET /api/psp/{psp_id} - Get single PSP details
Backend: POST /api/transactions (PSP) - Create transaction with PSP destination, commission_paid_by=client
Backend: POST /api/transactions (PSP) - Create transaction with PSP destination, commission_paid_by=broker
Backend: GET /api/psp/{psp_id}/pending-transactions - List pending PSP transactions
Backend: GET /api/psp/{psp_id}/settlements - List settlement history
Backend: POST /api/psp/transactions/{tx_id}/settle - Settle single transaction, updates treasury balance
Backend: DELETE /api/psp/{psp_id} - Delete PSP
Backend: Treasury balance update verification after settlement
Frontend: Login page loads correctly
Frontend: PSP navigation link visible in sidebar with CreditCard icon
Frontend: PSP page loads with summary cards (Total PSPs, Pending Settlement, Overdue Settlements)
Frontend: PSP cards display commission rate (%), settlement time (T+X), pending amount, status badge
Frontend: Add PSP button opens dialog with all fields (name, commission %, settlement days, destination, min amount, description)
Frontend: PSP creation via UI form works correctly
Frontend: Click PSP card opens details dialog with Pending Settlements and Settlement History tabs
Frontend: Pending transactions table shows Reference, Client, Amount, Commission, Net Amount, Expected date, Settle button
Frontend: Transaction form - Destination Type dropdown has Treasury and PSP options
Frontend: Transaction form - When PSP selected: shows PSP dropdown, Commission Paid By toggle, Commission Preview
Frontend: Commission preview shows Gross Amount, PSP Commission (-$X), Client Receives, Expected Settlement
Frontend: Commission toggle correctly switches between Client pays (deducted from deposit) and Broker (absorbs commission)
Frontend: Transaction created with PSP destination appears in transactions list
critical_code_review_comments: Missing aria-describedby on DialogContent components causing accessibility console warnings
Several React useEffect hooks have missing dependency warnings (non-blocking)
seed_data_creation: Seeded 3 PSPs (Stripe 2.9%, PayPal 3.5%, Skrill 2.5%) via /api/seed endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: PSP feature fully tested. All CRUD operations work. Transaction creation with PSP destination, commission toggle (client/broker), commission preview, and settlement workflow all functional. Settlement correctly updates treasury balance. No mocked APIs - all real backend integration. 3 seeded PSPs available for testing.

psp_dashboard.summary_cards: Working - Total PSPs, Pending Settlement, Overdue Settlements
psp_dashboard.psp_cards: Working - Shows commission rate, T+X settlement, pending amount, status

transactions_with_psp.psp_selection: Working - Dropdown with PSP name, commission %, settlement time
transactions_with_psp.commission_preview: Working - Shows gross, commission, net, expected settlement
